verbatim_quote: So one of the things that we proposed in this paper is sort of a hierarchy of what the future might look like for research agents. And so at the very bottom of this hierarchy, we might have a research agent that can reproduce a paper that it takes us and put a paper in, it can maybe run some experiments and reproduce the results in the paper.
